productDisplayName: Murcia Women Shimery Jute Tote Brown Handbag
description: Specialising in fashionable style, and crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. A master in elegance mixed with rustic themed craftsmanship, this bag with its rivet detailing is a covetable piece. Carry this hold-all sized bag to work or for a weekend on the ranch! The detailing on this stylish piece references the epitome of an Indian era gone by. The silhouette makes it perfect for formal outfits as well.Height: 34 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 6 cmMade of jute with metallic work, crystal embellishments and sequins on the front for durability and styleTwo leatherette shoulder handles woven through loops and chains for carrying easeOne main roomy compartment with an internal zipped pocket and a mobile pouchOne zipped pocket at the backAggressive rivet detailing along the sidesBrand badge on the frontBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
